column2: # Calculate absolute difference from China's rate for all countries
ggplot2::aes(x = Entity, y = fertility_rate, fill = Entity == "China")) +
label = paste0("China: ", china_rate), colour = "#e74c3c", size = 4, hjust = 0) +
title = "Countries with Fertility Rates Most Similar to China (2023)",
subtitle = "Top 5 closest countries by absolute difference in fertility rate",
caption = "Data Source: UN, World Population Prospects (2024) – processed by Our World in Data"
